requirement: the README says what QUALITY.md is and who it's for

findings.observation: The opening sentence states what QUALITY.md is (an agent-friendly file format plus companion skill and CLI) and who it is for (people building coding-agent/AI-assistant projects/harnesses) in the first lines.
The 'The Format' section gives a clear jargon-light definition (a structured quality model plus plain-language rationale), reinforcing the what.
Gap: the stated audience (coding-agent/AI harnesses) mismatches the worked 'Support Inbox' customer-support example, which can confuse a first-time reader about who the tool is for.
Gap: the problem solved is only implicit and somewhat circular ('continuously improving quality'); a reader does not learn what pain it removes.

rationale: A first-time reader learns within the opening lines what QUALITY.md is and who it is for, satisfying the requirement; held from outstanding by the audience/example mismatch and an implicit problem statement.
